title: Non Stick Pots and Pans Set – Induction Hob Pot Set – 8pcs Kitchen Cookware with Lids – Cooking Marble Saucepan Pots and Frying Pans – by Nuovva
features: 8-PIECE SET: Our marble cookware set includes 24cm casserole pot with lid, 16cm and 18cm saucepan with lid, 20cm and 24cm frying pan.
QUALITY MATERIAL: The Nuovva induction pot and pan set features a premium quality marble coating, a safer and stronger alternative to other chemical non-stick cookware.
NON-STICK: The marble 8pcs kitchen set features a non stick quality allowing much easier maintenance, less force and chemicals needed to clean!

HEALTHY: Our kitchen cookware set is a safer alternative to traditional non stick coatings made from toxic chemicals and minimise the use of oil needed to cook, make a difference to your health and cooking!

KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: Prepare an assortment of dishes with our marble cookware pots and pans set with lids; stir fry, stew, sear, boil, simmer, and so much more! A great gift for a loved one for all occasions!
description: Product Description Nuovva's Premium 8 pcs cookware set Make your life in the kitchen easier, healthier and more joyful with our 8 PIECES COOKE-WARE SET. We already know that cooking without the need to add any fat or oil makes meals healthier and cleaning-up quicker, but these pans also heat up quicker, stay hotter for longer and cook more evenly, giving you the perfect non-stick experience that allows the stickiest of meals to slide right off and wipe right out. This set makes the perfect gift for just about anyone! Impress the favorite chef in your life! It also makes the perfect gift for a host or hostess and is an especially wonderful housewarming gift! Pick up your set today and make cooking fun again! Features Non-stick coating Stainless steel induction base Anti-scratch surface Oven safe tempered glass lid with steam vent 100% PFOA free and food safe coating 8Pcs All In 1 Set This set is perfect for making quick and healthy meals since it can be used as a roasting pan, rice cooker, steamer, and saucepan. You can cook, fry, bake, broil, flambé & more in these super strong pans saving you space in the kitchen! Super Easy To Clean The Frying pan set has a Super Non stick Marble-coated finish that is super easy to clean and any dirt will slip right off. Soft Touch Handle Each pan features a sturdy, reliable design with a easy grip handle, making it easy to control the frying pan, avoiding burns or unwanted accidents. Superior heat transfer With its thick magnetic induction base, our pans have a superior and even heat transfer that will ensure your food gets cooked and fried evenly and fast.
